I didn't end up going to court, and the ticket got reduced to a no-point nonmoving violation. They did an amazing job, and I would definitely hire their services again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank u for your kind review.

reviews.text: I am a young driver.  I appreciate the law offices of Currie Law in Saginaw, because they were able to help me out with a ticket.  Insurance is so expensive these days, and I am thankful they were able to get the ticket reduced.  When I met with the lawyer, he took the time to talk to me, ask me about my interests, ask about my college plans, and generally gave me good life advice!  Thank you Currie Law, for being there when I needed you, and for giving me advice that I needed to hear.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank u for the kind review and good luck in your future endeavors.

reviews.text: So helpful, very educated. I must have sent a million emails and they still took care of it all with ease. And they set up an easy way to pay my county taxes. Prepared everything.

reviews.text: As previously mentioned, the whole process was painless.  One call, and it was handled from that point on.  I never had to show up for court, and Mr. Currie kept in constant contact through texts.  Was very impressed, and he did what he said he was going to do.
